title: User Audit Log
description: The User Audit Log provides a complete activity trail of all user actions within Parthenon — logins, cohort saves, analysis executions, role changes, and data exports. Use it to satisfy compliance requirements and investigate security incidents.
tips: Filter by feature or action type to narrow down activity to a specific module.
The date range filter uses UTC — adjust for your timezone when investigating time-sensitive events.
Audit records are immutable and cannot be deleted, ensuring a tamper-proof compliance trail.
Suspicious patterns like off-hours logins or bulk exports can be spotted with the date and action filters.
Super-admins see all users' activity; regular admins see only their own.
